content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.bags_fm
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/bags_fm.py (578 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Bags.fm Integration
===============================

Full integration with Bags.fm - The Solana launchpad where AI agents earn.

Capabilities:
- Authentication via Moltbook identity
- Wallet management (list, export)
- API key management
- Fee claiming (check claimable, claim, lifetime stats)

CLASSES:
- BagsCredentials: Bags.fm authentication credentials.
- BagsFMProvider: Complete Bags.fm integration for Cosmos.

Provides access to all Bags.fm capabil
  Methods: async def init_auth(self, username: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def complete_auth(self, username: str, post_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def list_wallets(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def export_wallet(self, wallet_address: str=None) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def list_api_keys(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def create_api_key(self, name: str='cosmos-key') -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def check_claimable_fees(self, wallet: str=None) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def generate_claim_transactions(self, wallet: str=None, positions: List[str]=None) -> Dict[str

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_bags_provider() -> BagsFMProvider
- async def bags_check_fees(wallet: str=None) -> Dict[str, Any]
- async def bags_get_quote(input_mint: str, output_mint: str, amount: int) -> Dict[str, Any]
- async def bags_launch_for_agent(username: str, name: str, symbol: str, desc: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
